source_pr.title: ddl: implement `ALTER DATABASE` to alter charset/collation
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Add support for `ALTER DATABASE` syntax

Related issue: pingcap/tidb#4641
Related parser PR: https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/318

### What is changed and how it works?
A new DDL job is added to change charset/collate for a database.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Integration test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - Increased code complexity

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch
 - Need to update the documentation
 - Need to be included in the release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: implement `ALTER DATABASE` to alter charset/collation.
fix_pattern: ddl: implement `ALTER DATABASE` to alter charset/collation

evidence: files: ddl/db_integration_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_api.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/rollingback.go, ddl/schema.go, executor/ddl.go, go.mod, go.sum, go.sum1, infoschema/builder.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, planner/core/preprocess.go, planner/core/preprocess_test.go, util/admin/admin.go
